hooks.command: node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH||''; const isTxt=f.endsWith('.txt')&&!f.includes('node_modules'); const isTs=f.endsWith('.ts')&&!f.includes('node_modules')&&!f.startsWith('dist/'); if(isTxt){require('child_process').execSync('npm run lint',{stdio:'inherit'})} if(isTs){require('child_process').execSync('npx tsc --noEmit',{stdio:'inherit'})}"
hooks.description: After editing a .txt scene file: run linter. After editing a .ts source file: run type-check.
Full type-check + lint gate before Claude marks the task complete.
